warnings: Leverage scores computed from minimal seed evidence; frequency data unavailable.
Effort estimates are approximations without historical execution data.
formula: leverage_score = (severity_weight * systems_impacted) / effort_weight; boosted 1.4x if blocks promotion or affects EVL/CDE/TPA

items.title: Expand eval coverage to full certification set
items.failure_prevented: Promotion without full eval evidence — regressions masked by partial coverage
items.signal_improved: EVL proof-chain stage from partial to present; unblocks TPA and CDE decisions

items.title: Unblock promotion gate via TPA adjudication completion
items.failure_prevented: Indefinite observe_only enforcement with no promotion path
items.signal_improved: Control decision from observe_only to allow; enables SEL certification

items.title: Wire full done_certification_record for promotion sign-off
items.failure_prevented: Promotion without done_certification_record — certification requirement bypassed
items.signal_improved: Certification stage from unknown to present in proof chain

items.title: Resolve SLO budget warning before next promotion window
items.failure_prevented: Error budget exhaustion without alerting during the next execution cycle
items.signal_improved: SLO stage from partial to present; reduces known risk surface in overlay loop

items.title: Complete replay long-horizon coverage for drift detection
items.failure_prevented: Long-horizon drift undetected across replay cycles — FM-SEED-REPLAY-GAP
items.signal_improved: REP stage from partial to present; reduces unknown replay surface
